title: Phase schema carries no success_criteria field
description: Composite levels (phase, milestone) carry no success_criteria. A phase is done when its tasks are done. The phase schema's optional success_criteria field is removed.

evidence.reference: phase items declare no success_criteria field

impact: Phase schema declares an optional success_criteria field the model forbids; composite-level criteria duplicate the child rollup.
proposed_resolution: Remove success_criteria from the phase schema; phase completeness derives from its tasks.
